modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty submitting leave requests through the experience portal.

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to figure out how to ask for time off from work. I need to record my vacation, sick leave, and other types of leave, but I’m not sure how to do it online. It’s a bit confusing, and I just want to get my requests approved.
short_description: Difficulty submitting leave requests through the experience portal.
description: I’m trying to figure out how to ask for time off from work. I need to record my vacation, sick leave, and other types of leave, but I’m not sure how to do it online. It’s a bit confusing, and I just want to get my requests approved.
